description: Canonical mapping from project_id to its photogrammetry GLB. Consumed by scripts/build_all.py and by Person 1's recommendation engine. Each entry's roof JSON is written to out/<project_id>.roof.json.

projects.label: Hamburg demo
projects.note: Real customer profile from projects_status_quo.csv. 4500 kWh/year, no existing solar, no EV.

projects.label: Brandenburg demo
projects.note: Real customer profile from projects_status_quo.csv. 6000 kWh/year + EV (12000 km/year). Roof historically sold as 43 modules + 15 kWh battery.

projects.label: North Germany demo
projects.note: Showcase tile only — no real CSV project bound. Replace project_id with a real one once selected by the team.

projects.label: Ruhr demo
projects.note: Showcase tile only — no real CSV project bound. Replace project_id with a real one once selected by the team.
